moduleDescription: This module implements helper procs for parsing Cookies.

entries.name: SameSite
entries.code:
SameSite {.pure.} = enum
  Default, None, Lax, Strict
entries.description: The SameSite cookie attribute. Default means that setCookie proc will not set SameSite attribute.

entries.name: parseCookies
entries.code: proc parseCookies(s: string): StringTableRef {.raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
entries.description:
Parses cookies into a string table.

The proc is meant to parse the Cookie header set by a client, not the "Set-Cookie" header set by servers.

entries.name: setCookie
entries.description:
Creates a command in the format of Set-Cookie: key=value; Domain=...; ...
Tip: Cookies can be vulnerable. Consider setting secure=true, httpOnly=true and sameSite=Strict.

entries.name: setCookie
entries.description: Creates a command in the format of Set-Cookie: key=value; Domain=...; ...
